Reliability improvements to filesystems, drastically reducing memory usage.
Extended the data pipeline and frontend capabilities to model complex temporal patient events, delivering a solution for researchers to track metrics of patients over time.

Developed an interactive frontend for a flood risk tool, visualizing probability and financial impact metrics to enable rich client presentations by consultants.
